prompt: Rename the app from Measure to BALANCE throughout the codebase per issue #11. This includes: package.json name field, README.md title and references, CLAUDE.md references, HTML page title in client/index.html, App.tsx header/branding text, and any other references to 'Measure' in the codebase. Use 'BALANCE' (all caps) for branding/display and 'balance' (lowercase) for package names and technical identifiers.
